greeting: Hi there! I'm the virtual receptionist at Art of Pet Grooming. How can I help your pet today?

faq.a: Yes! Call us at (623) 522-0077 to schedule your grooming appointment.

faq.q: Do you handle doodles and poodles?
faq.a: Absolutely! We specialize in doodle and poodle grooms with breed-specific haircuts.
Yes! We offer mobile grooming through our Sunshine Pet Grooming mobile service.
We're in Glendale, Arizona. Call us for exact location details.

faq.q: How long does a full groom take?
faq.a: Most full grooming sessions take 1.5-2 hours depending on your pet's breed and coat condition.
We primarily specialize in dog grooming. Please call us to confirm if we can help with your cat.

escalation: Great question! Let me have one of our groomers get back to you. Call us at (623) 522-0077.
